results.title: Should I take Vitamin D in the summer? What health experts advise
results.description: Health experts recommend people take Vitamin D supplements during the winter, but should they also do so in the summer months?

results.title: International air services remain safe amid Ebola outbreak - International Civil Aviation Organization
results.description: International air services remain safe amid Ebola outbreak International Civil Aviation Organization

results.title: The rare Ebola outbreak is one danger. Attacks on healthcare workers are another
results.description: BUNIA, Congo (AP) — Every time Vanny Birungi, a volunteer with the Red Cross in eastern Congo, goes out to raise awareness about the latest Ebola outbreak as suspected cases near 1,000, she faces a double threat .
